description: Style NoteUrban trendy need not always flout the rules. This clutch from toniq, balances the fine line between completely ethnic and elegance. We recommend debuting this lovely piece with your saris and with your evening dresses!Product DetailsBlack pleated clutch that's conical at the sides and has a press steel claspHas a removable shoulder chainHas a fabric inner with a pocket insideMaterial and Care70% polyester and 30% polyurethaneWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 10 cm x 27 cm
